CREATE TABLE test_xml (id INT, xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (1, XMLType('<local />'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (2, XMLType('<z:qname xmlns:z="http://www.example.com/"/>'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 2;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (3, XMLType('<local />', 'http://www.example2.com/test.xsd'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 3;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (4, XMLType('<z:qname xmlns:z="http://www.example.com/"/>', 'http://www.example2.com/test.xsd'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 4;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (5, XMLType('<qname xmlns="http://www.example.com/"/>', 'http://www.example2.com/test.xsd'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 5;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (6, XMLType('<z:qname xmlns:z="http://www.example.com/"/><z:qname xmlns:z="http://www.example.com/"/>', 'http://www.example2.com/test.xsd'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 6;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (7, XMLType('<local/>'));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 7;
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (8, XMLType('<local/>', NULL));
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 8;
SELECT xpath_eval('namespace-uri(.)', xml_data) FROM test_xml WHERE id = 5;
SELECT xml_data.getNamespace() FROM test_xml WHERE id = 2 AND xml_data.getNamespace() IS NOT NULL;
